case_title: ZAKHARY MALLETT VS. UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALLETT, ZAKHARY AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALLETT, ZAKHARY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2023 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO APR-11-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE, DANIEL CHINCHILLA, TO GAIN THE AUTHORITY TO WAIVE THE ADR AGREEMENT IN ORDER FOR THIS DISPUTE TO BE HEARD IN THIS COURT. PARTIES GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCES ARE EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING. PLAINTIFF ZAKHARY MALLETT IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIEL CHINCHILLA VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT'S SC-109 FORM ON FILE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE ADR AGREEMENT PER CONTRACT. PLAINTIFF ZAKHARY MALLETT IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIEL CHINCHILLA, PARALEGAL, VIA ZOOM. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT REQUEST THAT THEIR EXHIBITS BE SHREDDED IMMEDIATELY. THE COURT GRANTS THAT REQUEST. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF (ZAKHARY MALLETT) GARNTED**
REMARK:PLAINTIFF(ZAKHARY MALLETT) EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL.
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALLETT, ZAKHARY
REMARK:PLAINTIFF ZAKHARY MALLETT EXIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,323.38 FILED BY MALLETT, ZAKHARY AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SIGNATURE FOUND. SERVED JAN-19-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR DANIEL CHINCHILLA FILED BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO APR-10-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ZAKHARY MALLETT IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC, REPRESENTED BY DANIEL CHINCHILLA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. ZOOM GRANTED FOR TODAY'S HEARING IS EXTENDED TO THE NEXT COURT DATE OF APRIL 10, 2023. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
